description_long: This is an adult male pedestrian dressed in casual urban attire, featuring a loose-fitting jacket layered over a long shirt and baggy pants. He wears a flat-brimmed cap with a visible logo, large sunglasses, and a pair of sneakers, giving him a streetwise appearance. His hands are relaxed at his sides, and his posture is upright and natural. The clothing appears to be made of typical fabric materials, with the jacket having a slightly matte finish and the pants and shirt providing a layered look. Accessories such as the cap and sunglasses add to the urban style, while the shoes are designed for comfort and everyday walking. The overall build and proportions are consistent with an average adult male, and the asset is detailed enough to convey personality and context.
description: An adult male pedestrian in casual urban clothing, including a jacket, cap, sunglasses, and sneakers, standing upright. The style and accessories suggest a streetwise, everyday city look.
description_view_0: Side view showing the profile of the cap, sunglasses, and the layered clothing, with the relaxed arm and sneaker visible.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the face with sunglasses, the logo on the cap, the full jacket, and the stance with both arms slightly out.
description_view_2: Opposite side profile, similar to view 0, showing the other side of the cap, sunglasses, and clothing layers.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the back of the jacket, the cap, and the overall silhouette of the figure.
attribute_clothing_type: casual streetwear with a loose jacket, long shirt, baggy pants, and a flat-brimmed cap with sunglasses
